intro: LinkedIn Job Monitor tracks [linkedin.com](https://linkedin.com) searches over time тАФ including apply URLs, company metadata, full descriptions, skills, AI-ready summaries, and location data. Other scrapers charge you for the same job every day; this actor charges only when a listing is new or changed in incremental mode.
keyFeatures: **тЩ╗я╕П Incremental mode** тАФ recurring runs emit only NEW / UPDATED / REAPPEARED records; UNCHANGED and EXPIRED are opt-in. First run builds the baseline; subsequent runs emit and charge only for the diff.
**ЁЯФФ Notifications** тАФ Telegram, Slack, Discord, WhatsApp Cloud API, and generic webhook outputs. Pair with incremental + `notifyOnlyChanges` for daily new-job alerts.
**ЁЯдЦ AI-ready output** тАФ deterministic `aiSummary` and `skills` fields give compact context for ATS, recruiting agents, and MCP workflows without extra enrichment calls.

**ЁЯФЧ Paste-mode** тАФ paste a LinkedIn job search URL copied from your browser. The actor reads the URL's keywords, location, geoId, date, work type, job type, company, Easy Apply, and sort filters and runs that search directly.
**ЁЯЪл Recruiter-spam filter** тАФ `removeAgency: true` runs a heuristic post-filter on company names and drops listings from third-party agencies.
**ЁЯУЛ Detail enrichment** тАФ two-stage mode: list, then enrich each job with the full description plus detail-page fields such as apply counts and education.
**тЬВя╕П Description truncation** тАФ cap enriched descriptions with `descriptionMaxLength` when downstream systems need smaller records.

**ЁЯМО Multi-region with presets** тАФ pass `regions: ["US", "GB", "DE"]` for a custom country mix, or pick presets like `"nordic"`, `"dach"`, `"benelux"`, `"uk-ireland"`, `"eu-27"`, `"gcc"`, `"mena"`, `"asean"`, `"latam"`, or `"anglosphere"`.
**тЪб Easy-Apply filter** тАФ `easyApply: true` returns only LinkedIn Easy-Apply postings.
**ЁЯПв Company-level filtering** тАФ `companies: [123, 456]` filters at the LinkedIn API level, while `excludeCompanies` and `excludeKeywords` remove unwanted matches after fetch.
**ЁЯУж Compact mode** тАФ AI-agent and MCP-friendly compact payloads with core fields only; pipe them into your ATS, monitoring workflow, or LLM context without parsing extras.
useCases: Extract job data from linkedin.com for market research and competitive analysis
Monitor hiring demand across regions and categories over time
Monitor new and changed listings on scheduled runs without processing the full dataset every time
Auto-apply or feed apply URLs into your ATS / hiring pipeline
Research company hiring patterns, employer profiles, and industry distribution
Use structured location data for regional analysis, mapping, and geo-targeting
Feed structured data into AI agents, MCP tools, and automated pipelines using compact mode
Export clean, structured data to dashboards, spreadsheets, or data warehouses
